reference: Hi, my sister is not well. She is very confused and has regressed to behaving like a child. She is undergoing many tests, and they initially thought it was a brain tumor but ruled it out. Now they say she has very low blood sugar in her system and are testing her for motor neuron disease.
text: Hi, my sister is not well. She is very confused and has regressed to behaving like a child. She is undergoing many tests, and they initially thought it was a brain tumor but ruled it out. Now they say she has very low blood sugar in her system and are testing for motor neuron disease.
